_comment: ts-consumer-corpus TCC-EXT 1 starter manifest — packages KNOWN to ship .ts source in their npm tarball (not just .d.ts declarations). Selection criterion at first cut: high npm download count + verified .ts-source presence as of 2026-05-24. Top-200 expansion deferred to TCC-EXT 2 if the starter corpus is insufficient to populate Pred-tcc.4's actionable failure table.

packages.name: typescript
packages.rationale: TS compiler itself; ships entire src/ tree as .ts; ~600 files; largest single TS-source corpus on npm

packages.name: zod
packages.rationale: schema validation; pure-TS source under src/

packages.name: date-fns
packages.rationale: popular date utility; .ts source in newer versions

packages.name: drizzle-orm
packages.rationale: type-safe ORM; .ts source heavy use of generics + conditional types

packages.name: tslib
packages.rationale: TS runtime helpers; small but core dependency of most TS projects

packages.name: ws
packages.rationale: websocket; mostly .js but tests .ts; light corpus
